notes.f1: Recovered exactly. William H Ferber (G7JB-YH6) has Death 11 March 1903, Cincinnati, Hamilton, Ohio — the required stripped answer.
notes.f2: Bonus not recovered for the subject. The tree does have a 'Spring Grove Cemetery, Cincinnati' burial, but it sits on a DIFFERENT person (Charles Hubert Ferber, G7JB-Y46, d. 1967 Florida) — not on William Hubert Ferber, whose person carries no burial fact. So William's Spring Grove burial was not established. Bonus finding, so it does not affect the pass.
